title: U.S.-Saudi Deal Prompts Fears of a Nuclear Arms Race
summary_full: In Europe, Asia and the Middle East, countries seek nuclear capabilities to hedge against aggressive neighbors and a receding Washington, potentially creating a more freewheeling era.
